things.name: Hagia Sophia
things.description: Byzantine masterpiece (537 AD) that served as a church, mosque and museum — now a mosque again

things.name: Blue Mosque (Sultan Ahmet Camii)
things.description: The only mosque in Turkey with six minarets, famed for its 20,000 blue Iznik tiles

things.name: Topkapi Palace
things.description: Opulent seat of the Ottoman Empire for 400 years with the Harem, treasury and holy relics

things.name: Grand Bazaar (Kapali Carsi)
things.description: One of the world's oldest and largest covered markets with 4,000 shops and 500 years of history

things.name: Bosphorus Cruise
things.description: Scenic boat journey through the strait dividing Europe and Asia past palaces and Ottoman villas

things.name: Istanbul Archaeology Museums
things.description: Outstanding three-museum complex with Alexander the Great's sarcophagus and ancient Near Eastern artefacts

things.name: Spice Bazaar & Eminonu
things.description: The Egyptian Bazaar — overflowing with spices, Turkish delight, lokum and baklava since 1664

things.name: Galata Tower
things.description: Iconic 14th-century Genoese watchtower with a panoramic viewing gallery over the Golden Horn

things.name: Dolmabahce Palace
things.description: Magnificent 19th-century European-style palace on the Bosphorus — the last home of Mustafa Kemal Ataturk

things.name: Kadikoy & Asian Side
things.description: Take a ferry to the Asian side for the vibrant Kadikoy market, street food and a different Istanbul
